'''Inwil''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector's]] [[D'Aelgoth sector/Legends|Ralltiir]] [[Ralltiir system/Legends|system]].<ref name="CCW" />
